texto: Discrimination due to age is one of the great tragedies of modern life. The desire to work and be useful is what makes life worth living, and to be told your efforts are not needed because you are the wrong age is a crime.
explicacao: Citação de Johnny Ball sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Discrimination due to age is one of the great tragedies of modern life. The desire to work and be…” articula vida, work, great em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e work.
